title: USDA NASS announces retirement of Administrator Hubert Hamer
summary: The United States Department of Agriculture’s (USDA) National Agricultural Statistics Service’s (NASS) Administrator, Hubert Hamer, retired March 31, after more than 44 years of service at the agency.
